title: MANTIS — Web Tracker Audit Workflow
summary: SCAN → CLASSIFY → TRACE → DECIDE — a 30-minute workflow using the MANTIS Chrome extension and DuckDuckGo Tracker Radar to produce a complete third-party tracker inventory for any website, with privacy risk scoring and a Loi 25 / GDPR exposure findings file.

title: Implementation Guide Builder — The BUILD Framework
summary: The BUILD framework — Brief, Unpack, Install, Layer, Deploy — for turning any raw input into a structured guide ready to act on, sell, or teach. Runs as a Claude Code skill producing MD + interactive HTML deployed to Vercel via GitHub Actions.
